query.title: IMAP Search Query
query.description: IMAP search query. Does not apply to Graph API connection. Syntax reference.

graph_filter.title: Graph API Filter
graph_filter.description: OData $filter for exact matching. Can be combined with Period from date. See syntax reference.

options.tooltip:
**Exact match examples:**
`from/emailAddress/address eq 'someone@example.com'`
`subject eq 'exact subject'`
`hasAttachments eq true`

**Note:** `contains()` on subject/body is NOT supported and will return HTTP 400.

graph_search.title: Graph API Search (KQL)
graph_search.description: KQL keyword search. Cannot be combined with Graph API Filter or Period from date (MS limitation). Max 1,000 results.

options.tooltip:
**Keyword search:**
`subject:weekly`
`from:someone@example.com` (substring match)

**Exact phrase:**
`subject:"my exact phrase"`

**Date range:**
`received:2026-01-01..2026-01-31`

**Combined:**
`from:sender subject:keyword received:2026-01-01..2026-03-18`

**Note:** Relative dates (`received:this week`) do NOT work.

**IMAP:** Use folder path, e.g. `INBOX`, `Sent Items`
**Graph API:** Use well-known name (`inbox`, `sentitems`, `drafts`) or display name.

date_since.title: Period from date (including)
date_since.description: Date or relative expression (e.g. 5 days ago, yesterday). If empty, all records are downloaded.

options.tooltip:
**Format:** `YYYY-MM-DD` or dateparser string (`1 month ago`, `yesterday`, etc).

**Note:** Cannot be combined with Graph API Search – use `received:YYYY-MM-DD..YYYY-MM-DD` in KQL instead.

download_content.title: Download Content
download_content.description: When set to true, the content of the message will be downloaded.

download_attachments.title: Download Attachments
download_attachments.description: When set to true, also the attachments will be downloaded. By default into the File Storage. Use processors to control the behaviour.

mark_seen.title: Mark seen
mark_seen.description: When set to true, emails that have been extracted will be marked as seen/read.

attachment_pattern.title: Attachment Pattern
attachment_pattern.description: Regex pattern to filter particular attachments. e.g. to retrieve only pdf file types use: .+\.pdf If left empty, all attachments are downloaded.
